name: Esperion Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Overview Esperion is a commercial stage biopharmaceutical company currently focused on bringing new medicines to patients that address unmet medical needs. We have developed and are commercializing U.S. Food and Drug Administration, or FDA, approved oral, once-daily, non-statin medicines for patients who are at risk for cardiovascular disease, or CVD and are struggling with elevated low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, or LDL-C.
